ques: Find on Apple website how many types of AirPods (3rd generation) are available and what is the price difference.
answer: There are 2 types of AirPods (3rd generation) — one with a Lightning Charging Case and one with a MagSafe Charging Case. The MagSafe version costs about $20 (≈€20) more than the Lightning version ($189 vs $169 / €199 vs €179). Note: the 3rd generation is now discontinued on Apple's site (replaced by AirPods 4), so the compare page lists both types but no longer displays a live price.
